response.overview: Ma Alaya Kala Tharuniya is a 1959 Sri Lankan film directed by Sirisena Wimalaweera. The film stars Aruna Shanthi, Ananda Weerakoon,  Kumari Manel, Bandu Munasinghe,  N. R. Dias,  S. H. Jothipala,  E. Marshall Perera, Piyadasa Wijekoon. Released on 20 February. The film was produced in Sri Lanka.
response.title: Ma Alaya Kala Tharuniya
